description: A fresh-aromatic fougere that opens green and peppery then dries down creamy and woody with tonka and vanilla. An easy everyday men's scent for work and daytime, with good projection in heat.
identification_note: The men's flanker of Fakhar Lattafa (the blue/silver bottle sold alongside the women's Fakhar). Fragrantica lists the unisex original 'Fakhar Lattafa' (2015) but has no separate page for the Men version; notes taken from Lattafa's official site and Parfumo.

description: A soft fruity-amber scent: juicy pear over warm amber and creamy sandalwood. Light and easy-wearing, good for daytime and warm weather.
identification_note: Reef sells a three-bottle Summer collection - Summer Pink, Summer Yellow and Summer Tiffany (all 2023). 'Reef Summer' most likely means Summer Pink (the best-selling one), but the shop should confirm the bottle colour. Summer Yellow = orange blossom / blackcurrant / vanilla; Summer Tiffany is the third variant.

description: A classic Arabian oud built on saffron, herbal rosemary and deep agarwood. Rich and resinous - best for evenings, weddings and cooler nights.
Sweet and spicy: saffron and sugar over rose and oud, drying down to caramel and warm woods. A dressy evening scent with strong longevity.
identification_note: Sold as Extrait de Parfum; some retailers list it as EDP.

description: A soft, sweet floral-gourmand: pear and peony over praline, finishing on vanilla and musk. Softer and creamier than the original Angham; suits daytime and everyday wear.
A dessert-style gourmand - caramel, milk and sugar over honey, settling into vanilla and praline. Very sweet and cosy; best for cooler evenings and casual wear.
identification_note: Sometimes spelled 'Eclair'. Flankers exist (Eclaire Pistache, Eclaire Banoffi, Eclaire Mist) - this entry is the original.

description: Spicy ginger and pink pepper over lavender, praline and cacao, landing on a thick vanilla-amber base. Widely bought as an affordable stand-in for Burberry Goddess; best for evenings and cooler weather.
A berry ice-cream gourmand: raspberry and strawberry with marshmallow, over vanilla and caramel. Playful and sweet - a young, casual daytime scent.
identification_note: Fragrantica lists it simply as 'Raspberry Ripple' under Arabiyat Prestige; the bottle and retailers use the fuller 'Gelato Raspberry Ripple'. Part of the Gelato series by My Perfumes.

input_name: Lattafa Badee Al Oud Noble Blush
description: Creamy and dessert-like: milky rose over meringue and almond, finishing on vanilla, sandalwood and musk. Soft and feminine, easy for daytime and office wear.
identification_note: Also listed on Fragrantica simply as 'Noble Blush' (page 98937). Despite the Bade'e Al Oud name it is a milky gourmand, not an oud scent.

description: A dark, complex oud: fresh almond-citrus opening, florals with an animalic edge, then a deep oud, coffee and amber base. Heavy and long-lasting - for evenings and special occasions.
identification_note: One of three Detour Noir versions (original 2021, Intense 2024, Exclusif 2024) - confirm which bottle the shop stocks.

description: A candy-shop gourmand - strawberry and marshmallow over whipped cream, coconut and vanilla musk. Reads like a strawberry milkshake; sweet, casual and popular with younger buyers.
Bright citrus with a peppery, spicy heart and a dry vetiver finish. Clean and fresh - a good hot-weather and daytime option; often compared to Louis Vuitton Meteore.
identification_note: Marketed for men; several retailers list it as unisex.

description: Fresh fruit and white flowers over a soft vanilla-musk base. Light, feminine and versatile - suits daytime, work and warm weather.
identification_note: Sold as 'Lattafa Raneen' by many shops but the house on the bottle is Asdaaf, Lattafa's budget sub-brand. Common sizes 80ml and 100ml.

description: Warm and spicy: honey and nutmeg over cinnamon and jasmine, drying into vanilla, tonka and cedar. Strong projection and longevity - an evening and cool-weather scent.
identification_note: The brand is Atralia; 'Magma' is the product line. Sold as an 80ml Extrait de Parfum.

description: Creamy coconut and ylang-ylang over a warm sandalwood and benzoin base, opened by spice and citrus. Smooth and slightly tropical - works day or evening, especially in warm weather.
identification_note: Also sold as 'Musamam Intense White' by some retailers. Perfumer: Gael Montero.

description: Crisp pear and bergamot over clean white florals, finishing on soft musk and amber. Fresh and easy - a good office and daytime scent for hot climates.
identification_note: There is also a men's Habik; this entry is the women's version.

description: Juicy mango and citrus with a ginger kick, settling into cedar, ambergris and oakmoss. Bright but grown-up - a versatile unisex pick for daytime and warm weather.
Tart blackcurrant into a rosy floral heart, grounded by vanilla, patchouli and ambroxan. Romantic and feminine with decent strength - suits evenings and gifting.
identification_note: Part of Rayhaan's Color Collection (Rayhaan is a house under Afnan Perfumes). No Fragrantica page found; notes confirmed via Rayhaan's official site, Wikiparfum and Parfumo. Release year approximate.

description: A rich vanilla-caramel gourmand with fruit and soft florals through the middle. Warm and dressy - made for evenings, parties and cooler nights.
identification_note: Written 'Soiree' on Fragrantica, 'Soiree' with accent on the bottle. Sold in a 110ml bottle.

description: Juicy pineapple against smoky leather and deep oud. Bold and long-lasting - an evening and special-occasion scent, not a light daytime one.
identification_note: From Reef's Arabs collection, sold as 'Obaiah', 'Obaiah Arabs' or 'Arabs of Obaiah'. Fragrantica lists the same pineapple/leather/oud composition under 'Abaya Arabs' (2021).
